reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio hermosa, nueva. La hosteria para dormir está muy bien. La calefacción/aire funcionó perfecto. Es viejita pero muy bien. Agua super caliente para la ducha.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is beautiful and new. The guesthouse is very nice. The heating/air conditioning worked perfectly. It's a bit old but very good. Super hot water for the shower.

reviewReply.comment: Hola. Nosotros nontenemos hosteria!!! Igual agradecemos tu calificación

reviews.comment:
Pase a cargar combustible estando de viaje... llene el tanque de Infinia Diesel.... una fortuna ..  ... venia con el vidrio sucio... no habia nadie mas y NI me ofrecieron limpiar el parabrisas ... ==>   pero eso no es nada  ==>   la calificación mala va por esto==>  mi esposa me compró un café para poner en mi vaso termico y se lo cobraron (10/04/24) $ 2.700.-, le dijeron único precio... "refill" ... me lo lleno tanto que ni lugar para el azucar sin rebalsar y super aguado y recontra hervido y caliente...  aparte de un asquete de café ... UN VERDADERO ABUSO  de precio..  lo normal hubiera sido hasta $ 1 500.-/$1.800.- pero no mas de ahi.. . Encima el baño oloroso y sin toallas de papel..

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to get gas while traveling... I filled up the Infinia Diesel tank... a fortune... ... the window was dirty... there was no one else and they DID NOT EVEN offer to clean the windshield... ==> but that's nothing ==> the bad rating is because of this ==> my wife bought me a coffee to put in my thermos and they charged her (10/04/24) $ 2,700.-, they told her the only price... "refill"... they filled it so full that there was no room for sugar without it overflowing and it was super watery and super boiled and hot... aside from a lot of coffee... A REAL ABUSE of price... the normal thing would have been up to $ 1,500.-/$1,800.- but no more than that... On top of that, the bathroom smelled and there were no paper towels.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Adrian me podes precisar cuando pasaste para ver que pasó?

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREN2J5SDJBRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Hola Javier. Me podes dar algún comentario para entender tu calificación

reviews.comment:
La atencion y surtido  del minimarket  muy buena, incluso cenamos alli, pero no habia baños habilitados,  las puertas estaban cerradas, las de todos los baños,teniendo en cuenta que es una de las pocas estaciones yendo por ruta 40  es una pena que no considere esa necesidad basica del cliente.
Entiendo, tal vez justo llegue en el momento de la limpieza, eran las 21:30 aprox. Tal vez debieran dejar aunque sea 1 baño habilitado mientras se limpia el resto. De verdad que veniamos de muchas horas de viaje y paramos a cargar combustible, comer algo y poder pasar por el sanitario antes de seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
The service and selection at the minimarket were very good; we even had dinner there. However, there were no working restrooms; all the doors were closed. Considering it's one of the few stations along Route 40 with open restrooms, it's a shame they don't consider this basic customer need.

I understand; perhaps I arrived just as they were cleaning, around 9:30 PM. Perhaps they should at least keep one restroom open while the others are being cleaned. We had been traveling for many hours and stopped to refuel, grab a bite to eat, and use the restroom before continuing our journey.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Jaqui. Nuestros baños estan habilitados las 24 hs del día. Es probable que los hayan estado limpiando, pero es un ratito y se habilitan denuevo
